introSection: Speed Mouse is a travelling steel spinning Wild Mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned & travelled by French showman M. Jacquier.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster operated at Fami P.A.R.C in Nonville, Île-de-France, France, from June 1 until August 28, 2006.

fullText:
Speed Mouse is a travelling steel spinning Wild Mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently owned & travelled by French showman M. Jacquier.

This roller coaster operated at Fami P.A.R.C in Nonville, Île-de-France, France, from June 1 until August 28, 2006.

Yellow track with pink supports.
